tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Verify SAELens, TransformerLens, and all dependencies are installed. Verify access to pretrained SAE (gpt2-small-res-jb). No new installation needed if already present from prior iterations.

tasks.name: E1: UAD with Random Baseline
tasks.description: Run UAD on GPT-2 Small layer 8 and compute random baseline F1. Compare UAD F1 vs same-cluster random F1 vs global random F1. Target: demonstrate UAD F1 = same-cluster random F1 (both detect exactly 1 TP out of 4,155).

visualizations.description: UAD F1 vs Random Baseline F1

pilot.pass_criteria: UAD runs without error; F1 computed for all baselines

tasks.name: E2: UAD Ablation Studies
tasks.description: Test 6 UAD ablations: full UAD, no dead filter, no phi filter, no clustering, single-linkage clustering, K-means clustering. Compare F1, precision, recall per variant. Target: all variants fail; K-means achieves high recall but near-zero precision.

visualizations.description: UAD ablation results: F1 per variant
Precision vs Recall trade-off for clustering variants

pilot.pass_criteria: All 6 variants run successfully; K-means recall > 0.5

tasks.name: E3: Collision Rate Internal Consistency
tasks.description: Compute collision rate (top-K feature overlap Jaccard) and true absorption rate for 56 concept pairs across numbers and punctuation hierarchies. Compute Spearman correlation with bootstrap 95% CI. Target: r >= 0.5, CI excludes zero.

visualizations.description: Collision rate vs true absorption rate (n=56)

tasks.name: E4: Token-Level Mutual Exclusivity Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze token-level activations for absorption features. Show that features absorbing the same parent concept fire on different tokens and never co-occur. Compute phi coefficients between absorption features. Target: phi ~ 0 or negative for absorption pairs.

visualizations.description: Token-level activation heatmap for number features

pilot.pass_criteria: Activation heatmap shows clear mutual exclusivity pattern

tasks.name: E5: Bootstrap CI for F1
tasks.description: Compute bootstrap 95% CI for UAD F1 by resampling examples with replacement 1000 times. Report CI for F1, precision, recall. Target: CI computed and reported.

visualizations.description: Bootstrap F1 distribution with 95% CI marked

pilot.pass_criteria: 1000 bootstrap samples computed, CI bounds reported

tasks.name: Baseline: Same-Cluster Random
tasks.description: Randomly sample N pairs from within UAD clusters (where N = same-cluster pairs found by UAD). Repeat 100 times. This is the core baseline showing UAD provides zero improvement over trivial random sampling.

tasks.name: Baseline: Global Random
tasks.description: Randomly sample N pairs from all possible feature pairs. Repeat 100 times. Shows UAD is only marginally better than completely random selection.

tasks.name: Main Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate all results (E1-E5, baselines, ablations). Generate main result tables and figures. Compute effect sizes and summarize contributions. Verify all numbers match source JSON files.

pilot.pass_criteria: All tables generated, numbers verified against source JSON

tasks.name: Generate Paper Figures
tasks.description: Generate all figures from experiment JSON results: (1) token activation heatmap, (2) UAD F1 comparison bar chart, (3) collision rate scatter plot, (4) K-means precision-recall scatter. Use matplotlib/seaborn. Save as PDF and PNG.
